title: Render Pipeline Compatibility
description: Shader names, property names, and tool behavior by Unity render pipeline

BuiltIn.notes: Legacy pipeline. Use '_Color' for color properties. No URP packages required.

URP.notes: Universal Render Pipeline. Use '_BaseColor' for color properties. Requires com.unity.render-pipelines.universal package.

HDRP.notes: High Definition Render Pipeline. Use '_BaseColor' for color properties. Requires com.unity.render-pipelines.high-definition package.

common_mistakes.cause: Shader not found or pipeline mismatch
common_mistakes.fix: Call project/preflight to identify the pipeline, then use the correct shader name

common_mistakes.cause: Using '_Color' in URP/HDRP or '_BaseColor' in Built-in
common_mistakes.fix: Use '_BaseColor' for URP/HDRP, '_Color' for Built-in. Check SuggestedColorProperty in material/create result.
Use UseUrpParticlesMaterial=true in particle/set-renderer, or specify MaterialPath explicitly

common_mistakes.cause: Neither URP nor Built-in shaders available as fallback
common_mistakes.fix: Ensure render pipeline package is installed. Check InstalledPackages from project/preflight.
